extension.description: Ensure AI chat terminals use the correct Conda or venv per workspace, with quick setup, verification, and export tools for Windows, WSL/Linux, and macOS.
command.configureEnvironment.title: AI Environment Manager: Configure Environment
command.changePlatform.title: AI Environment Manager: Change Platform
command.changeCondaEnvironment.title: AI Environment Manager: Change Conda Environment
command.verifyEnvironment.title: AI Environment Manager: Verify Environment
command.openPreparedTerminal.title: AI Environment Manager: Open Prepared Terminal
command.refreshEnvironments.title: AI Environment Manager: Refresh Environments
command.setPreparedTerminalAsDefault.tit: AI Environment Manager: Use Prepared Terminal for Commands
command.changePythonEnvironmentType.titl: AI Environment Manager: Change Environment Type
command.exportRequirements.title: AI Environment Manager: Export requirements.txt
command.exportEnvironmentYaml.title: AI Environment Manager: Export environment.yml
configuration.title: AI Environment Manager
configuration.platform.description: Platform where the environment runs. Use wsl for WSL/Linux.
configuration.condaEnv.description: Name of the Conda environment to use.
configuration.venvPath.description: Relative path to the venv/virtualenv folder (for example: .venv).
configuration.promptOnMissingEnvironment: When enabled, opens the configuration panel automatically if the workspace has no environment selected.
